chapter_title.en: Chapter 173 – The greetings upon the women

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/374)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/374)
text: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يُسَلِّمُ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ وَ يَرْدُدْنَ عَلَيْهِ وَ كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) يُسَلِّمُ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ وَ كَانَ يَكْرَهُ أَنْ يُسَلِّمَ عَلَى الشَّابَّةِ مِنْهُنَّ وَ يَقُولُ أَتَخَوَّفُ أَنْ يُعْجِبَنِي صَوْتُهَا فَيَدْخُلَ عَلَيَّ أَكْثَرُ مِمَّا طَلَبْتُ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Rabie Bin Abdullah,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>asws</sup> used to greet the women and they would respond upon it, and Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> would greet the women and was disliking greeting upon the young ones from them, and he<sup>asws</sup> was saying, ‘I<sup>asws</sup> do not like that her voice may fancy me<sup>asws</sup>, so there would enter into me<sup>asws</sup> more than what I<sup>asws</sup> am seeking from the Recompense’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Yahya from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim who has said the following: “Abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You (men) must not offer Salam (the phrase of offering greeting of peace) to a woman.’”
